You can get 36x on Ramona turn 1 with the right setup and exalts charged <:ramona_tuff_:1441426630420467753>
funny enough Ramona is probably the best one out these bcuz she steal str as well for self scaling

I don't really thunk it's fair to compare Uvhash's exalt danage to Doresain's. The former is aoe and the latter is single-target, so of course Uvhash's strength scaling would be lower. Uvhash's kit (especially with OE) is much more aoe-oriented with some multi-hit and self-damage, while Doresain's has always been predominantly single-target "sniper" kind of kit with some added healing and aoe on-kill. If Uvhash's strength scaling was the same as Doresain's while hitting everything in the field, then there would truly be no reason to use Doresain over him.
the point isn't rly about doorstain its about how weak uvhash is that the worst arc 2 dps still looks better than him <:thinking1:1356068128936820929>
Plus its not like Uvhash is even strong enough to kill alert 5 mobs unless you want to start the next fight on 1 hp
